name: Antibody Evolution
description: Given a sequence, uses language models to generate point mutations predicted to increase antibody binding affinity. Experimentally shown to improve binding affinities of four clinically relevant, highly mature antibodies up to sevenfold and unmatured antibodies up to 160-fold.
capabilities: Given a sequence, uses language models to generate point mutations predicted to increase antibody binding affinity
Experimentally shown to improve binding affinities of four clinically relevant, highly mature antibodies up to sevenfold and unmatured antibodies up to 160-fold

sequence.description: Antibody amino acid sequence to evolve for improved binding affinity

numMutations.description: Maximum number of point mutations to introduce

numSequences.description: Number of evolved sequence variants to generate
